title: Executive Director of Early Childhood
notes: Large K-12 USD (~27,700 students). Operates dedicated EC centers (Beyer, Fairview, Nashold). Strong PFA/ECBG district -- top priority. EC department page: rps205.com/o/rps/page/early-childhood.

title: Assistant Superintendent for Curriculum & Instruction
notes: HSD 9-12 only, no PreK -- low priority. Manola transitioned from East Leyden principal to Asst Supt C&I effective July 2024.

title: Assistant Superintendent for Curriculum & Instruction
notes: HSD 9-12 only (ETHS), no PreK -- low priority. Domain shifted to eths202.org from eths.k12.il.us. Bavis in role since 2012.

title: Early Childhood Coordinator
notes: K-8 ESD (~6,000 students). Runs PKP program (ISBE-funded language-based) at Longfellow and Blended EC program at Whittier. Uses Creative Curriculum, Handwriting Without Tears, Second Step. Email format inferred (first initial + last @op97.org); supervisor in Student Services/Core Instruction.

title: Assistant Superintendent of Learning
notes: K-8 CCSD. EC program at Oak Elementary serves 3-5 year-olds with/without IEPs (tuition + IEP slots). EC line 630-861-4300. Superintendent Dr. Hector Garcia. Email format inferred from district pattern.

title: Assistant Superintendent for Learning & Innovation
notes: HSD 9-12 only, no PreK -- low priority. Department of Learning & Innovation leads C&I. Email format inferred from district pattern.

title: Principal, Early Learning Academy
notes: USD K-12. Dedicated Early Learning Academy (formerly Todd ECC) at 1870 W. Galena Blvd. Klomhaus has led EC since 2011. Strong PFA/ECBG district. Email format inferred from district pattern (first initial + last @sd129.org).

title: Assistant Superintendent / Principal, Lake Forest High School
notes: HSD 9-12 only, no PreK -- low priority. D115 shares admin with D67 (elementary) via Lake Forest Schools shared office; curriculum oversight via Asst Supt of Teaching, Learning & Accountability.

notes: K-8 SD. Superintendent: Luis Correa (appointed Jan 2023). Helfers owns C&I including EC. No dedicated EC director.

notes: K-8 SD. EC program at Sprague School -- blended 3/4/5 year-olds (gen ed + special ed). Student Services owns EC; no dedicated EC director.

notes: Large USD K-12. Dedicated Early Learning Center at 2501 S 1st St. Strong PFA/Smart Start fit -- top priority.
